zh.Elgin, Morayshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾爾金爾埃爾金
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dunegal Moray於1090年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親Duncan52歲，母親Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray57歲。他於大約1118年與Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世在英國蘇格蘭莫雷，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Elgin, Morayshire, Scotland: 苏格兰艾爾金爾埃爾金
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dunegal Moray于1090年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲Duncan52岁，母亲Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray57岁。他于大约1118年与Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世在英国苏格兰莫雷，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Moray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McRae
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of a patronymic from the Gaelic personal name Mac Raith ‘son of grace or prosperity’. Compare McGrath , the usual Irish form of this surname.

nameMeanings.name: Dunegal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: variant of   Donegan  . This form of the surname is rare in Ireland and Britain.

variants.name: Donegan
meanings: Dona, unhappy, and gan, offspring, signifying and unhappy child

en.lifeSummary: When Dunegal Moray was born in 1090, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Duncan, was 52 and his mother, Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray, was 57. He married Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith about 1118, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dunegal Moray est né en 1090, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Duncan, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray, avait 57 ans. Il a épousé Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith environ 1118, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dunegal Moray 1090 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duncan 52 und seine Mutter Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray 57. Er hat um 1118 in Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dunegal Moray è nato il nel 1090 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Duncan, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray, aveva 57 anni. Lui sposato Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith circa 1118, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Dunegal Morayが1090年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Duncanは52歳，母Octreda De Allerdale countess of Morayは57歳であった。約1118年にイギリススコットランドでLady Dunegal Of Strathnithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリススコットランドモーアイで死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dunegal Moray(이)가 1090년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duncan(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray(은)는 57세였다. 그는 대략 1118년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dunegal Moray nasceu em 1090, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Duncan, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray, tinha 57 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith aproximadamente 1118, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dunegal Moray родился в 1090 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Duncan было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray, 57. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith около 1118 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dunegal Moray nació en 1090, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Duncan, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Octreda De Allerdale countess of Moray, tenía 57 años. Se casó con Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith aproximadamente 1118, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
